state.output:
task_id: ses_1e1712bd9ffe09pZxbjxlsdaiL (for resuming to continue this task if needed)

<task_result>
session_id: `auth_refresh_session`
blob_id: `auth_refresh_session`
message_id: `auth_fact_2`

Answer: `src/auth/queue.ts` deduplicates refresh work per tenant so same-tenant refreshes coalesce, while unrelated tenants stay parallel.

Rationale: A single global mutex was rejected because it would make unrelated tenants block each other; the queue uses a per-tenant key instead.
</task_result>
state.title: Investigate transcript evidence
